Definition: species as named in Bauernfeind et al. 2013 Table 3
hemisphere the species mean refers to (left or right)
Note: Table 3 prints left and right blocks side by side

Definition: number of individuals contributing to the species mean for that hemisphere
Note: can differ between hemispheres (e.g. Pongo pygmaeus n=1 left / 2 right)

Definition: insular subdivision (Granular / Dysgranular / Agranular / FI / Total)
Note: Total = whole insula for that hemisphere

Definition: species mean subdivision volume in mm3 (printed in cm3 as mean +/- SD; x1000)
Note: species-mean summary of the per-individual Tables 1 (left) and 2 (right)

Definition: standard deviation of the subdivision volume in mm3 (printed in cm3; x1000)
Note: NA where n=1 (single specimen; no SD printed)

Definition: printed units cm3 converted to project units mm3 (x1000). Table 3 is a species-mean summary (mean +/- SD) of the per-individual left (Table 1) and right (Table 2) insula volumes; it is kept for traceability and is not re-merged (the merge recomputes species means from Tables 1 and 2).
